title: phalaris brachystachys
intro: Phalaris brachystachys, also known as small quaking grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Phalaris brachystachys is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
